implementation_notes: merlin_save_system.gd:294 — extended _validate_run_state() from 15 to 34 lines. Added: (1) life_max required key + numeric check >= 1. (2) cards_played required key + numeric + >= 0 check. (3) faction_rep_delta required key + Dictionary type check + all 5 FACTIONS keys check. Stays < 50 lines.
patterns_added: PAT-077: faction ending trigger (check_run_end) does NOT check rep >= 80 — FACTION_THRESHOLD_ENDING constant defined but unused in ending logic. This is a HIGH compliance gap.
PAT-078: tick_cooldowns (store_oghams.gd:78) decrements ALL oghams in cooldown — no active_ogham filter. Bible says only active ogham's cooldown decrements.
